addon.name: Magpie Repository
addon.provider-name: [B][COLOR silver]C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e[/COLOR][/B]

extension.summary: Repository of [COLOR silver]C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e[/COLOR] add-ons
extension.description:
[COLOR dimgray][B]Magpie Repository[/B] [/COLOR] The official repository of [COLOR silver]C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e[/COLOR] add-ons. [COLOR darkgray] Distribution of the Magpie Repository is permitted. [/COLOR] [COLOR silver] IMPORTANT: Distribution of C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e add-ons are NOT permitted.
C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e add-ons are exclusively distributed via the Magpie Repository and / or [COLOR silver]C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e[/COLOR] on GitHub.
The code and files of these add-ons are free for use, subject to crediting C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e. [/COLOR]

addon.name: Abacus Program
addon.provider-name: [B][COLOR silver]C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e[/COLOR][/B]

extension.summary: Tally of Code-E-Magpie development on GitHub
extension.description:
[COLOR dimgray][B]Abacus Program[/B] [/COLOR] Tally of [COLOR silver]C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e[/COLOR] development on GitHub. [COLOR darkgray] The Abacus Program has a menu of information, tally of [COLOR silver]C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e[/COLOR] development on GitHub and an exit button. [/COLOR] [COLOR silver] IMPORTANT: Distribution of this add-on is NOT permitted. This add-on is exclusively distributed via the Magpie Repository and / or C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e on GitHub.
The code and files of this add-on are free for use, subject to crediting C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e. [/COLOR]

addon.name: Database Toolbox
addon.provider-name: [B][COLOR silver]C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e[/COLOR][/B]

extension.description:
[COLOR yellow][B]Database Toolbox[/B] [/COLOR] Please read the Instructions before use. [COLOR silver] Please see the Changelog to see what is new. [/COLOR] [COLOR darkgray] To view the Instructions and the Changelog: open the add-on to access the menu and click on 'U s e r I n f o r m a t i o n >' [/COLOR] [COLOR silver] IMPORTANT: Distribution of this add-on is NOT permitted. This add-on is exclusively distributed via the Magpie Repository and / or C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e on GitHub.
The code and files of this add-on are free for use, subject to crediting C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e. [/COLOR]

addon.name: Reorder Favourites
addon.provider-name: [B][COLOR silver]C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e[/COLOR][/B]

extension.summary: Easy to use reordering of favourites
extension.description:
[COLOR yellow][B]Reorder Favourites[/B] [/COLOR] Please read the Instructions before use. [COLOR silver] Please see the Changelog to see what is new. [/COLOR] [COLOR darkgray] To view the Instructions and the Changelog: open the add-on to access the menu and click on 'U s e r I n f o r m a t i o n >' [/COLOR] [COLOR silver] IMPORTANT: Distribution of this add-on is NOT permitted. This add-on is exclusively distributed via the Magpie Repository and / or C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e on GitHub.
The code and files of this add-on are free for use, subject to crediting C[COLOR dimgray]o[/COLOR]d[COLOR dimgray]e[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]E[/COLOR]-[COLOR dimgray]M[/COLOR]a[COLOR dimgray]g[/COLOR]p[COLOR dimgray]i[/COLOR]e. [/COLOR]
